title: AntiInvisibility
body:
Invisibility Reveal
Ever been killed by someone you couldn't see? This client-side mod forces invisible players to always render visibly — no more getting ambushed by someone chugging an invisibility potion.
What it does:
Simply install and forget. Any player affected by the Invisibility effect will be rendered completely normally, as if they had no potion at all. No keybind, no config, no setup.
Features:

🔍 Invisible players are always visible to you
✅ Works on any server — no server-side installation needed
⚡ Zero performance impact
🎮 No configuration required — just install and play

Compatibility:

Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11
Requires Fabric Loader
Requires Fabric API

Note:
This mod only affects your own client. Other players will not know you can see them.
